task_completion.description: Verify the Alert Profile name is configured correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Profile Name' field in the ADAudit Plus interface contains exactly 'Unauthorized_Software_Detection'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct category and event are selected
task_completion.visual_evidence: The configuration shows 'Software Installation' selected, typically under the 'Member Server Audit' category or report profile.

task_completion.description: Verify the alert severity is set to Critical
task_completion.visual_evidence: The severity dropdown, radio button, or selection indicates 'Critical'.

task_completion.description: Verify the alert description is entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' field contains exactly 'Alerts when new software is installed on member servers'.

task_completion.description: Verify the alert message is configured with the correct variables
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Alert Message' field contains exactly 'Warning: Software installed by %USER_NAME% on %YOUR_HOST_NAME%'.

task_completion.description: Verify the screenshot of the completed configuration is saved to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file explorer, image viewer, or terminal shows a file named 'software_alert_created.png' saved in the 'C:\workspace' directory.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the ADAudit Plus web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a web browser navigating the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus application, not a script or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the configuration was not typed into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into the actual form fields of the ADAudit Plus web application, not Notepad or another text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the saved screenshot is a genuine capture of the application
integrity.visual_evidence: The image saved at C:\workspace\software_alert_created.png depicts the actual ADAudit Plus interface and not a fabricated image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Profile Name: 'Unauthorized_Software_Detection'. Expected Category: 'Software Installation' within 'Member Server Audit'. Expected Severity: 'Critical'. Expected Description: 'Alerts when new software is installed on member servers'. Expected Alert Message: 'Warning: Software installed by %USER_NAME% on %YOUR_HOST_NAME%'. Output Screenshot Path: 'C:\workspace\software_alert_created.png'.
